channel.title: BigSur on Ahmad Jamali
channel.description: Recent content in BigSur on Ahmad Jamali

item.title: Unable to Launch the vCenter 7 Installer From MacOS Big Sur
item.description: Last Friday, I wanted to upgrade my vCenter server with embedded platform (VCSA) from version 6.7 to 7.0. I downloaded the ISO and mounted that on my Mac. However, as soon as I clicked to launch the UI installer is when my Mac started to block it and not even letting me launch it. See the screenshot below: I had to go to System Pereferences > Security & Privacy > General and manually click on “Open Anyway” to launch this installer because it was blocked from use as it is not from an identified developer according to Apple.
